So, we have (x1 + x2 + … + xn + 15 + 1)/(n+1 + 1) = (x1 + x2 + … + xn + 15)/(n+1) – 1. This means x1 + x2 + … + xn + 15 = n+1. From these two equations, we get 2n = x1 + x2 + … + xn = n+1. Hence, the number of steps on the escalator at a time is 10 times the number of steps on the escalator when the person is walking up it. \[
\left \lfloor \dfrac{n}{1} \right \rfloor + \left \lfloor \dfrac{n}{2} \right \rfloor + \cdots + \left \lfloor \dfrac{n}{10} \right \rfloor = 1999.
\]

\]
